records.description: Jest test timeout exceeded — increase test timeout via --testTimeout flag or set_timeout hint

stderr_regex: Exceeded timeout of \d+ ms for a test|jest\.setTimeout|--testTimeout

shortest_verification.command: node -e "console.error('thrown: \"Exceeded timeout of 5000 ms for a test.\nUse jest.setTimeout(newTimeout) to increase the timeout value, if this is a long-running test.\"')" 2>&1 || true

fix_path.description: Jest test timeout exceeded — increase test timeout via --testTimeout flag or set_timeout hint

legacy_v3.stderr_pattern: Exceeded timeout of \d+ ms for a test|jest\.setTimeout|--testTimeout
legacy_v3.description: Jest test timeout exceeded — increase test timeout via --testTimeout flag or set_timeout hint

reproduction.command: node -e "console.error('thrown: \"Exceeded timeout of 5000 ms for a test.\nUse jest.setTimeout(newTimeout) to increase the timeout value, if this is a long-running test.\"')" 2>&1 || true

authored_fixture.expected_stderr_regex: Exceeded timeout of \d+ ms for a test|jest\.setTimeout|--testTimeout
authored_fixture.fix_rationale: The asynchronous operation needs roughly 60 ms, so increasing the configured --testTimeout above that duration lets the test finish normally.

reviewer_record.notes: authored by codex; pre-fix fails+matches regex, post-fix passes

records.description: Generic Node.js operation timeout — increase timeout for network or I/O bound operations

shortest_verification.command: node -e "const ac=new AbortController(); setTimeout(()=>ac.abort(),50); const {setTimeout:st}=require('timers/promises'); st(10000,null,{signal:ac.signal}).catch(e=>console.error(e.message))" 2>&1 || true

fix_path.description: Generic Node.js operation timeout — increase timeout for network or I/O bound operations

legacy_v3.description: Generic Node.js operation timeout — increase timeout for network or I/O bound operations

reproduction.command: node -e "const ac=new AbortController(); setTimeout(()=>ac.abort(),50); const {setTimeout:st}=require('timers/promises'); st(10000,null,{signal:ac.signal}).catch(e=>console.error(e.message))" 2>&1 || true

authored_fixture.fix_rationale: The stream pipeline timeout must be longer than the deterministic 120ms read delay so the operation can complete.

reviewer_record.notes: authored by codex; pre-fix fails+matches regex, post-fix passes
